# Unaffiliated Implementer Invitation

Status: draft; no organisation has been identified or contacted.

The preferred qualifying route is an unaffiliated public-sector or research
organisation that has a real need for deterministic process or rules
conformance evidence. The organisation would independently implement a small
PIC consumer, curate its own synthetic oracle, run the self-contained kit, and
publish the resulting evidence packet.

The invitation must state that participation is bounded, does not imply legal,
clinical, funding, or policy endorsement, and does not require adoption of the
RaC repository's implementation. It must request the fields in
`conductor/tracks/v1_independent_validation_20260714/SUBMISSION_SCHEMA.json`.

No invitation may be sent until Dylan identifies the organisation and approves
the exact communication.
